misc: Bags Miura irons and is rumoured to sleep with them.
biography: From Hirsala Golf, Miso is a competitor whose profound commitment to his craft is almost as legendary as the tournament itself. His unwavering devotion extends notably to his Miura irons, a set so meticulously cared for that rumors persist of Miso's personal affinity extending to their nightly repose, a testament to his deep belief in precision engineering and the tools of the game.

Across his ten dedicated appearances in the Hector Trophée, Miso has been instrumental in a team's triumph, culminating in a memorable victory where he and his partner claimed the coveted Hector Trophée. This achievement stands as a testament to his precise execution and strategic acumen within the paired format. However, the prestigious individual Victor Trophy has, thus far, eluded his grasp, representing a challenge he continues to pursue with the same meticulous attention he applies to his equipment.

While Miso maintains an active status within the Hector events, he will not be among the field for the Hector Trophée 2026. His absence will undoubtedly be noted, leaving a void for those accustomed to witnessing his disciplined approach and his cherished Miura irons on the course, with anticipation for his potential return in future editions, where his quest for individual glory will undoubtedly resume.
